name: Zuleika Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 28-cm/11-inch cake tin with removable base using 2 teaspoons butter.
2. Coat the prepared tin with fresh breadcrumbs.
3. Preheat oven to 200°C/400°F/Gas Mark 4.
4. Mix 150 grams (5 ounces) ground almonds and 210 grams (7 ounces) caster sugar in a bowl until combined.
5. In another bowl, beat 6 egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gently fold into the almond mixture.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared cake tin and bake for 18-20 minutes at the bottom of the oven.
7. To prepare icing, mix 6 egg yolks, 300 ml (10 fl oz) cream, and 130 grams (4 ounces) caster sugar in a saucepan. Cook over low heat until thickened, adding boiling water if needed to prevent separation or curdling.
8. Allow both cake and icing to cool before assembling. Spread the icing over the cooled cake base.
9. Serve with flaked roasted almonds and enjoy with sweet white wine or white port.
Level of Difficulty: Easy Preparation Time: 1 hour
